creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kevin,

Thanks for your submission. The patch looks good to me, except that a PORTREVISION has been introduced to gqrx meanwhile. Find attached an updated version of the patch that includes that change, as well as removes the trailing slash from WWW: in pkg-descr.

Bartek, as you own the PR, I'll let you commit it ; it is OK for me :)

Best regards,
Ganael.
